privileged_info_summary: This task requires bilateral craniofacial asymmetry analysis using InVesalius 3 with a real DICOM dataset (fox_dataset/0437, 13.2 MB CT scan from GitHub v3.0 release). The task requires: (1) bone segmentation and 3D surface generation, (2) placement of minimum 12 linear measurements (with bilateral protocol: corresponding measurements on both left and right anatomical sides), (3) measurement minimum of 10 mm to exclude spurious clicks, (4) STL mesh export with at least 10,000 triangles, (5) capture of 5 orientation screenshots (anterior, left lateral, right lateral, superior, posterior) at 10 KB minimum each, (6) complete project save to asymmetry_analysis.inv3. All file paths, measurement thresholds, and dataset specifications are consistent across task.json, setup scripts, verifier logic, and documentation.
